components.name: ActionButton
components.description: A button component with integrated tooltip functionality, combining Button and ActionTooltip from Gravity UI.

props.name: children
props.description: Button content (icon, text, or any ReactNode)

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the button

props.name: wrapperClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper

components.name: Alert
components.description: An alert message component with variant-based icons and optional expandable content and action button.

props.name: variant
props.description: Alert variant determining icon and style

components.name: ChatDate
components.description: Displays formatted dates with optional time, supporting relative dates and custom format strings.

props.name: date
props.description: Date value in string, Date, or number (timestamp) format

props.name: relative
props.description: Display relative dates (today, yesterday, two days ago, etc.)

components.name: ContextIndicator
components.description: A progress indicator for context usage, showing percentage as a bar and number. Supports number or percent input types.

props.name: type
props.description: Indicator mode: number (usedContext/maxContext) or percent (usedContext as percentage)

props.name: maxContext
props.description: Maximum context value (required when type is 'number')

components.name: ContextItem
components.description: A label-based context item with optional close/remove functionality.

props.name: content
props.description: Content to display in the context item

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback when context item close button is clicked

components.name: DiffStat
components.description: Displays added and deleted line counts for code diffs.

components.name: Disclaimer
components.description: Displays informational or warning disclaimer messages with customizable typography.

components.name: IntersectionContainer
components.description: A container that triggers a callback when it intersects with the viewport using IntersectionObserver.

props.name: onIntersect
props.description: Callback triggered when element enters viewport

components.name: Loader
components.description: A loader component with streaming (animated dots) and loading (spinner) views.

components.name: MarkdownRenderer
components.description: Renders markdown content to HTML using diplodoc/transform with memoization and optional incomplete markdown parsing.

props.name: shouldParseIncompleteMarkdown
props.description: Whether to parse incomplete markdown (e.g., during streaming)

components.name: MessageBalloon
components.description: A styled container for chat message content, providing balloon-style visual wrapper.

components.name: Shimmer
components.description: A shimmer/skeleton loading animation wrapper for content placeholders.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to wrap with shimmer effect

components.name: SubmitButton
components.description: A submit button with state management for enabled, disabled, loading, and cancelable states.

props.name: cancelableText
props.description: Custom cancelable text shown in cancelable state

components.name: ToolIndicator
components.description: A status indicator icon for tool operations, showing success, error, info, or loading states.

components.name: BaseMessage
components.description: Base message component providing action buttons (copy, edit, retry, like, unlike, delete) and timestamp display for chat messages.

props.name: actions
props.description: Array of action buttons or custom React nodes

props.name: userRating
props.description: Current user rating for the message

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.description: A container for grouping buttons with horizontal or vertical orientation.

components.name: PromptInputBody
components.description: The main input area for prompt input, with a textarea or custom content. Supports auto-resize and forwarded ref.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to replace the default textarea

props.name: inputClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for input element

components.name: PromptInputFooter
components.description: Footer section of prompt input with action icons (settings, attachment, microphone) and submit button.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to replace the default footer (SubmitButton will still be rendered)

components.name: PromptInputHeader
components.description: Header section of prompt input with optional context items on the left and context indicator on the right.

props.name: contextItems
props.description: Array of context items to display on the left

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to replace the default header

components.name: PromptInputPanel
components.description: A panel component for displaying custom content in the prompt input area.

components.name: RatingBlock
components.description: Universal rating block with title and star rating for CSAT, product reviews, or any feedback collection.

props.name: title
props.description: Title text or React element (e.g., with links)

components.name: StarRating
components.description: Interactive star rating component with hover effects, accessibility support, and configurable sizes.

props.name: aria-label-star
props.description: Custom aria-label formatter for individual stars

components.name: Suggestions
components.description: Displays a group of clickable suggestion buttons arranged in grid or list layout with optional title.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of suggestion items to display

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback function called when a suggestion is clicked

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout orientation: grid for horizontal, list for vertical

props.name: wrapText
props.description: Enable text wrapping inside buttons instead of ellipsis

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tab navigation component using Label-based tabs with optional delete functionality and icon support.

props.name: items
props.type: { id: string; title: string; icon?: React.ReactNode }[]

props.name: activeId
props.description: ID of the currently active tab

props.name: onSelectItem
props.description: Callback when a tab is selected

props.name: onDeleteItem
props.description: Callback when a tab is deleted

components.name: ToolFooter
components.description: Footer for tool messages with action buttons, loading indicator, and optional content.

props.name: content
props.description: Optional content displayed next to loader

props.name: showLoader
props.description: Whether to show the loading indicator

components.name: ToolHeader
components.description: Header for tool messages with tool icon, name, content, action buttons, and status indicator.

components.name: ToolStatus
components.description: Displays tool status as an indicator icon or cancelled text based on the current tool status.

components.name: AssistantMessage
components.description: Renders an assistant chat message with support for multiple content types (text, thinking, tool) via a message renderer registry.

props.name: content
props.description: Message content (string, single content object, or array of content objects)

props.name: shouldParseIncompleteMarkdown
props.description: Whether to parse incomplete markdown during streaming

components.name: Header
components.description: Chat header with title, icon, and configurable action buttons (new chat, history, folding, close).

props.name: baseActions
props.description: Array of base action types to display

props.name: historyButtonRef
props.description: Ref for the history button (used as popup anchor)

props.name: withIcon
props.description: Whether to show the header icon

props.name: showTitle
props.description: Controls visibility of title and preview

components.name: MessageList
components.description: Scrollable message list with smart auto-scroll, lazy loading of previous messages, error handling, and optional rating block.

props.name: loaderStatuses
props.description: Chat statuses that display the loader

props.name: hasPreviousMessages
props.description: Whether there are older messages to load

props.name: ratingBlockProps
props.description: Rating block configuration rendered after messages list

components.name: PromptInput
components.description: Flexible chat input component with simple and full views, supporting header, body, footer, suggestions, and expandable panels.

props.name: view
props.description: View variant: full with all features or simple with minimal UI

props.name: status
props.description: Chat status to determine input behavior

components.name: ThinkingMessage
components.description: Displays AI model's internal reasoning process as a collapsible block with copy support and loading indicator.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Whether the block is initially expanded

components.name: ToolMessage
components.description: Displays a tool execution message with header, expandable body, and footer with confirmation/rejection actions.

props.name: expandable
props.description: Whether the body content is expandable

props.name: initialExpanded
props.description: Whether the body is initially expanded

props.name: autoCollapseOnSuccess
props.description: Auto-collapse body when status becomes success

props.name: autoCollapseOnCancelled
props.description: Auto-collapse body when status becomes cancelled

components.name: UserMessage
components.description: Renders a user chat message with optional avatar, supporting plain text and markdown formats.

props.name: showAvatar
props.description: Whether to show the user avatar

props.name: avatarUrl
props.description: URL for the user avatar image

components.name: ChatContent
components.description: Main chat content with state switching between empty welcome screen (EmptyContainer) and message list (MessageList).

props.name: view
props.description: Display mode: empty for EmptyContainer, chat for MessageList

props.name: emptyContainerProps
props.description: Props for EmptyContainer (used when view is empty)

props.name: messageListProps
props.description: Props for MessageList (used when view is chat)

components.name: EmptyContainer
components.description: Welcome screen component with image, title, description, and clickable suggestion buttons with configurable layout.

props.name: image
props.description: Image or icon to display at the top

props.name: title
props.description: Title text or custom React element for the welcome screen

props.name: description
props.description: Description text or custom React element explaining the functionality

props.name: onSuggestionClick
props.description: Callback when a suggestion is clicked

props.name: alignment
props.description: Alignment configuration for image, title, and description

props.name: wrapText
props.description: Enable text wrapping inside suggestion buttons instead of ellipsis

props.name: showMoreText
props.description: Custom text for the show more button

components.name: History
components.description: Chat history popup component wrapping HistoryList in a Popup anchored to a reference element.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when popup open state changes

props.name: onSelectChat
props.description: Callback when a chat is selected

props.name: onDeleteChat
props.description: Callback when a chat is deleted

props.name: hasMore
props.description: Whether there are more chats to load

props.name: loadMode
props.description: Load mode: full (button click) or lazy (scroll)

props.name: groupBy
props.description: Group chats by date or none

components.name: ChatContainer
components.description: Fully assembled chat component integrating Header, ChatContent, PromptInput, Disclaimer, and History. The main exportable page-level component.

props.name: messages
props.description: Array of messages in current chat

props.name: onSendMessage
props.description: Callback when user sends a message

props.name: onSelectChat
props.description: Callback when user selects a chat from history

props.name: onCreateChat
props.description: Callback when user creates a new chat

props.name: onDeleteChat
props.description: Callback when user deletes a chat

props.name: onDeleteAllChats
props.description: Callback when user deletes all chats

props.name: onFold
props.description: Callback when user folds or unfolds the chat

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when user closes the chat

props.name: contextItems
props.description: Array of context items to display in prompt input header

props.name: messageListConfig
props.description: MessageList configuration for actions and loader behavior

props.name: welcomeConfig
props.description: Welcome screen configuration for empty state

props.name: i18nConfig
props.description: I18n configuration for all text labels

props.name: hideTitleOnEmptyChat
props.description: Hide header title when chat is empty

props.name: headerClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for header section

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for content section

props.name: footerClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for footer section

hooks.name: useDateFormatter

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Object with date (string | Date | number) and optional format (string)

hooks.description: Formats dates with memoization, returning formatted date, time, full date, dayjs object, validity, and relative day difference.

hooks.name: useToolMessage
hooks.signature: function useToolMessage(options: ToolMessageProps): { isExpanded: boolean; toggleExpanded: () => void; headerActions: Action[]; footerActions: Action[]; footerContent: React.ReactNode; showLoader: boolean; isWaiting: boolean }

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Tool message configuration including status, actions, body content, and callbacks

hooks.return_type: { isExpanded: boolean; toggleExpanded: () => void; headerActions: Action[]; footerActions: Action[]; footerContent: React.ReactNode; showLoader: boolean; isWaiting: boolean }
hooks.description: Manages tool message state including expand/collapse, auto-collapse on success/cancelled, and default footer actions for confirmation/submission statuses.

hooks.name: useSmartScroll
hooks.signature: function useSmartScroll<T extends HTMLElement>({ isStreaming, messagesCount, status }: { isStreaming?: boolean; messagesCount: number; status?: ChatStatus }): UseSmartScrollReturn<T>

parameters.name: isStreaming
parameters.description: Whether the chat is currently streaming

hooks.description: Smart auto-scroll hook that scrolls to bottom during streaming while respecting user scroll-up, using MutationObserver for DOM changes.

hooks.name: useScrollPreservation
hooks.signature: function useScrollPreservation<T extends HTMLElement>(containerRef: RefObject<T>, messagesCount: number): void

parameters.name: containerRef
parameters.description: Reference to the scrollable container element

parameters.name: messagesCount
parameters.description: Current count of messages in the list

hooks.description: Preserves scroll position when older messages are loaded at the top, preventing the chat from jumping when new content is prepended.

hooks.name: useAutoCollapseOnSuccess
hooks.signature: function useAutoCollapseOnSuccess(options: { enabled: boolean; status: TToolStatus | undefined; setIsExpanded: (expanded: boolean) => void }): void

parameters.name: options
parameters.type: { enabled: boolean; status: TToolStatus | undefined; setIsExpanded: (expanded: boolean) => void }
parameters.description: Configuration with enabled flag, tool status, and expand state setter

hooks.description: Automatically collapses expanded content when tool status changes to success.

hooks.name: useAutoCollapseOnCancelled
hooks.signature: function useAutoCollapseOnCancelled(options: { enabled: boolean; status: TToolStatus | undefined; setIsExpanded: (expanded: boolean) => void }): void

parameters.name: options
parameters.type: { enabled: boolean; status: TToolStatus | undefined; setIsExpanded: (expanded: boolean) => void }
parameters.description: Configuration with enabled flag, tool status, and expand state setter

hooks.description: Automatically collapses expanded content when tool status changes to cancelled.

hooks.name: useMarkdownTransform
hooks.signature: function useMarkdownTransform(content: string, options?: OptionsType): string
hooks.description: Transforms markdown content to HTML using diplodoc/transform with block-level caching for efficient re-renders.

hooks.name: useRemend
hooks.signature: function useRemend(content: string, enabled: boolean): string

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether to enable incomplete markdown parsing

hooks.description: Closes incomplete markdown tags using the remend library, useful for rendering partial markdown during streaming.
